question: Is the image a realistic photo-style shot of a programmer's workstation with a late-night atmosphere?
Does the desk scene include a keyboard, mouse, tangled charging cables, a coffee cup, and several sticky notes?
Are there three computer screens lit simultaneously, positioned Left, Middle, and Right?
Is the text on the Left Screen rendered in a monospace font and correctly positioned?

On the Left Screen, are the imports exactly: 'from __future__ import annotations', 'import asyncio', 'import json', 'import time', 'from dataclasses import dataclass', and 'from typing import Any, Dict'?
On the Left Screen, is the 'Job' class defined with the '@dataclass' decorator and fields: 'id: str', 'kind: str', 'payload: Dict[str, Any]', 'created_at: float'?
On the Left Screen, is the 'handle' function signature exactly 'async def handle(job: Job) -> Dict[str, Any]:'?
On the Left Screen, does the return statement in 'handle' match exactly: "return {'id': job.id, 'ok': True, 'kind': job.kind, 'age_ms': int((now() - job.created_at) * 1000)}"?
On the Left Screen, does the 'main' function initialize 'q: asyncio.Queue[Job]' and use 'q.put_nowait' to add two specific jobs ('j-001', 'j-002')?
On the Left Screen, is the logic 'while True:', 'job = await q.get()', 'result = await handle(job)', and 'print(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False))' correctly rendered?
On the Left Screen, is the indentation and line structure of the Python code preserved correctly?
Is the text on the Middle Screen rendered in a monospace font and correctly positioned?
On the Middle Screen, is the 'CreateTodo' Zod object defined with 'title: z.string().min(1)' and 'due: z.string().optional()'?
On the Middle Screen, is the POST handler 'app.post('/api/todos'...)' visible with the ID generation line "const id = `t-${Date.now()}`"?
On the Middle Screen, is the PATCH handler 'app.patch('/api/todos/:id/done'...)' visible with the logic 't.done = true'?
On the Middle Screen, does the code end with 'app.listen(8080, () => { console.log('listening on 8080') })'?
Is the text on the Right Screen rendered in a monospace font and correctly positioned?
On the Right Screen, does the Deployment section include 'name: inference-api', 'image: example/inference-api:1.2.0', and env vars 'LOG_LEVEL'/'WORKERS'?
On the Right Screen, are the resource limits defined as 'cpu: 200m', 'memory: 256Mi' (requests) and 'cpu: '1'', 'memory: 1Gi' (limits)?
On the Right Screen, is the Service section separated by '---' and defined with 'port: 80' and 'targetPort: 8080'?
On the Right Screen, is the HorizontalPodAutoscaler section visible with 'minReplicas: 2', 'maxReplicas: 10', and 'averageUtilization: 70'?
On the Right Screen, is the YAML indentation structure correctly preserved?
Is there a specific yellow sticky note on the desk with handwritten text?
Does the sticky note text include: "Run tests & lint before merge; prod changes MUST have rollback script + observability metrics"?
Does the sticky note text include: "Confirm stable before merging to main & silencing alerts"?
Is the image free from any other text, logos, or UI elements not specified in the prompt?
Is the text on all screens legible despite the requested perspective angle and effects?
Are the text characters free from severe structural degradation (e.g., melting letters, merged lines, or garbled glyphs)?
